=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/build-basics-demo-shell.js ===
function escapeHtml(value) {
    return String(value ?? '')
        .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
        .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
        .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
        .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
        .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
}

export function buildBasicsDemoShell({
    rows = [],
    note = '',
    stageClass = '',
    stageContent = ''
} = {}) {
    const selectorRows = rows
        .filter((row) => row && row.label && row.selector)
        .map((row) => `
            <div class="basics-demo-selector-row">
                <span class="basics-demo-eyebrow">${escapeHtml(row.label)}</span>
                <code class="basics-demo-selector">${escapeHtml(row.selector)}</code>
            </div>
        `)
        .join('');

    return `
        <div class="basics-demo-panel">
            <div class="basics-demo-header">
                <div class="basics-demo-selector-stack">${selectorRows}</div>
                ${note ? `<div class="basics-demo-copy">${escapeHtml(note)}</div>` : ''}
            </div>
            <div class="basics-demo-stage ${stageClass}">${stageContent}</div>
        </div>
    `;
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/build-flex-lab-css.js ===
function readValue(value, fallback) {
    return value === undefined || value === null ? fallback : value;
}

export function buildFlexLabCss(state, options = {}) {
    const direction = readValue(state.direction, 'row');
    const wrap = readValue(state.wrap, 'nowrap');
    const justify = readValue(state.justify, 'flex-start');
    const alignItems = readValue(state.alignItems, 'stretch');
    const alignContent = readValue(state.alignContent, 'stretch');
    const gap = readValue(state.gap, 16);
    const accent = options.accent || '#67e8f9';
    const radius = readValue(options.radius, 20);
    const note = options.note || 'Every direct child becomes a flex item.';

    return `/* Parent selector: this is where the flex formatting context starts. */
.flex-wrapper {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: ${direction};
  flex-wrap: ${wrap};
  justify-content: ${justify};
  align-items: ${alignItems};
  align-content: ${alignContent};
  gap: ${gap}px;
}

/* Child selector: ${note} */
.flex-child {
  min-width: 108px;
  min-height: 92px;
  padding: 12px;
  border-radius: ${radius}px;
  background: ${accent};
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22);
}`;
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/content/load-lesson-copy.js ===
import { renderMarkdown } from './render-markdown.js';
import { findLessonDiagram } from './read-lesson-diagram.js';

const lessonCopyCache = new Map();
const identity = (value) => value;

function cloneValue(value) {
    if (typeof structuredClone === 'function') {
        return structuredClone(value);
    }

    return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
}

async function loadText(path) {
    const response = await fetch(path);
    if (response.status === 404) {
        return null;
    }

    if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to load lesson markdown file "${path}".`);
    }

    return response.text();
}

function parseFrontmatter(markdown) {
    if (!markdown) {
        return { attributes: {}, body: '' };
    }

    const source = String(markdown).trim();
    if (!source.startsWith('---\n')) {
        return { attributes: {}, body: source };
    }

    const match = source.match(/^---\n([\s\S]*?)\n---(?:\n|$)/);
    if (!match) {
        return { attributes: {}, body: source };
    }

    const attributes = {};
    let activeKey = null;
    const frontmatter = match[1];

    frontmatter.split('\n').forEach((line) => {
        const trimmedLine = line.trim();
        if (!trimmedLine) {
            return;
        }

        const keyMatch = trimmedLine.match(/^([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+):\s*(.*)$/);
        if (keyMatch) {
            const [, key, rawValue] = keyMatch;
            if (rawValue) {
                attributes[key] = rawValue.trim();
                activeKey = null;
                return;
            }

            attributes[key] = [];
            activeKey = key;
            return;
        }

        const itemMatch = trimmedLine.match(/^-\s+(.+)$/);
        if (itemMatch && activeKey) {
            attributes[activeKey].push(itemMatch[1].trim());
        }
    });

    return {
        attributes,
        body: source.slice(match[0].length).trim()
    };
}

function createLanguageField(sr, en, mapper = renderMarkdown, sourcePaths = {}) {
    if (!sr && !en) {
        return undefined;
    }

    return {
        sr: sr ? mapper(sr, { sourcePath: sourcePaths.sr }) : '',
        en: en ? mapper(en, { sourcePath: sourcePaths.en }) : ''
    };
}

function createLanguageValue(sr, en) {
    if (sr === undefined && en === undefined) {
        return undefined;
    }

    return { sr, en };
}

function readLanguageValue(field, language, fallback) {
    if (!field) {
        return cloneValue(fallback);
    }

    if (field[language] !== undefined) {
        return cloneValue(field[language]);
    }

    if (field.sr !== undefined) {
        return cloneValue(field.sr);
    }

    if (field.en !== undefined) {
        return cloneValue(field.en);
    }

    return cloneValue(fallback);
}

function mergeLanguageValue(currentValue, nextValue) {
    if (!nextValue) {
        return currentValue;
    }

    return {
        sr: nextValue.sr !== undefined ? cloneValue(nextValue.sr) : cloneValue(currentValue && currentValue.sr),
        en: nextValue.en !== undefined ? cloneValue(nextValue.en) : cloneValue(currentValue && currentValue.en)
    };
}

function parseLessonMetadata(markdown) {
    if (!markdown) {
        return null;
    }

    const { attributes } = parseFrontmatter(markdown);
    return {
        title: attributes.title || '',
        meta: Array.isArray(attributes.meta)
            ? attributes.meta
            : (attributes.meta ? [attributes.meta] : [])
    };
}

function parseControlLabels(markdown) {
    if (!markdown) {
        return {};
    }

    return String(markdown)
        .split('\n')
        .reduce((labels, line) => {
            const match = line.trim().match(/^-\s+`?([^`:\n]+)`?\s*:\s*(.+)$/);
            if (!match) {
                return labels;
            }

            const [, key, label] = match;
            labels[key.trim()] = label.trim();
            return labels;
        }, {});
}

function parsePreviewMarkdown(markdown, options = {}) {
    if (!markdown) {
        return null;
    }

    const sourcePath = options.sourcePath;

    function renderPreviewInline(markdownLine) {
        const rendered = renderMarkdown(markdownLine, { sourcePath }).trim();
        const paragraphMatch = rendered.match(/^<p>([\s\S]*)<\/p>$/);
        return paragraphMatch ? paragraphMatch[1] : rendered;
    }

    const lines = String(markdown).split('\n');
    const title = (lines.find((line) => line.trim().startsWith('# ')) || '').replace(/^#\s+/, '').trim();
    const descriptionLines = [];
    const quickTips = [];
    let proTipsRaw = '';
    let mermaid = '';
    let inDiagram = false;
    let inMermaidFence = false;
    let activeSection = 'description';

    lines.forEach((line) => {
        const trimmedLine = line.trim();

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('# ')) {
            return;
        }

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('## ')) {
            const sectionLabel = trimmedLine.slice(3).trim().toLowerCase();
            if (sectionLabel.includes('saveti') || sectionLabel.includes('tips')) {
                // If it contains "pro" or "tricks", we treat it as a rich text section
                if (sectionLabel.includes('pro') || sectionLabel.includes('tricks')) {
                    activeSection = 'pro-tips';
                } else {
                    activeSection = 'tips';
                }
                return;
            }

            if (sectionLabel.includes('dijagram') || sectionLabel.includes('diagram')) {
                activeSection = 'diagram';
                inDiagram = true;
                return;
            }

            activeSection = 'description';
            return;
        }

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('```mermaid')) {
            inMermaidFence = true;
            mermaid = '';
            return;
        }

        if (trimmedLine === '```' && inMermaidFence) {
            inMermaidFence = false;
            return;
        }

        if (inMermaidFence) {
            mermaid += `${mermaid ? '\n' : ''}${line}`;
            return;
        }

        if (!trimmedLine) {
            return;
        }

        if (activeSection === 'tips' && /^[-*]\s+/.test(trimmedLine)) {
            quickTips.push(renderPreviewInline(trimmedLine.replace(/^[-*]\s+/, '').trim()));
            return;
        }

        if (activeSection === 'pro-tips') {
            proTipsRaw += `${proTipsRaw ? '\n' : ''}${line}`;
            return;
        }

        if (activeSection === 'description' && !inDiagram) {
            descriptionLines.push(trimmedLine);
        }
    });

    return {
        title,
        description: descriptionLines.join(' '),
        quickTips,
        proTips: proTipsRaw ? renderMarkdown(proTipsRaw, { sourcePath }) : '',
        mermaid,
        diagramAsset: mermaid
            ? findLessonDiagram({ sourcePath, mermaidSource: mermaid })
            : null
    };
}

function parseQuizMarkdown(markdown) {
    if (!markdown) {
        return [];
    }

    return String(markdown)
        .split(/^##\s+/m)
        .map((block) => block.trim())
        .filter(Boolean)
        .map((block) => {
            const lines = block.split('\n').map((line) => line.trim()).filter(Boolean);
            const questionLine = lines.find((line) => line.startsWith('? ')) || '';
            const explanationLine = lines.find((line) => line.startsWith('! ')) || '';
            const optionLines = lines.filter((line) => /^-\s+\[(x| )\]\s+/i.test(line));

            const options = optionLines.map((line) => line.replace(/^-\s+\[(x| )\]\s+/i, '').trim());
            const answer = optionLines.findIndex((line) => /^-\s+\[x\]\s+/i.test(line));

            return {
                question: questionLine.replace(/^\?\s+/, '').trim(),
                options,
                answer: answer === -1 ? 0 : answer,
                explanation: explanationLine.replace(/^!\s+/, '').trim()
            };
        });
}

async function loadLessonCopyFromPath(documentsPath) {
    const paths = {
        lessonSr: `${documentsPath}/lesson.sr.md`,
        lessonEn: `${documentsPath}/lesson.en.md`,
        controlsSr: `${documentsPath}/controls.sr.md`,
        controlsEn: `${documentsPath}/controls.en.md`,
        sectionSr: `${documentsPath}/section.sr.md`,
        sectionEn: `${documentsPath}/section.en.md`,
        lessonsSr: `${documentsPath}/lessons.sr.md`,
        lessonsEn: `${documentsPath}/lessons.en.md`,
        theorySr: `${documentsPath}/theory.sr.md`,
        theoryEn: `${documentsPath}/theory.en.md`,
        theoryEasySr: `${documentsPath}/theory-easy.sr.md`,
        theoryEasyEn: `${documentsPath}/theory-easy.en.md`,
        theoryProSr: `${documentsPath}/theory-pro.sr.md`,
        theoryProEn: `${documentsPath}/theory-pro.en.md`,
        previewSr: `${documentsPath}/preview.sr.md`,
        previewEn: `${documentsPath}/preview.en.md`,
        quizSr: `${documentsPath}/quiz.sr.md`,
        quizEn: `${documentsPath}/quiz.en.md`
    };

    const entries = await Promise.all(
        Object.entries(paths).map(async ([key, path]) => [key, await loadText(path)])
    );

    const content = Object.fromEntries(entries);
    const lessonMetadataSr = parseLessonMetadata(content.lessonSr);
    const lessonMetadataEn = parseLessonMetadata(content.lessonEn);

    return {
        titleByLanguage: createLanguageValue(lessonMetadataSr && lessonMetadataSr.title, lessonMetadataEn && lessonMetadataEn.title),
        metaByLanguage: createLanguageValue(lessonMetadataSr && lessonMetadataSr.meta, lessonMetadataEn && lessonMetadataEn.meta),
        controlLabelsByLanguage: createLanguageValue(parseControlLabels(content.controlsSr), parseControlLabels(content.controlsEn)),
        section: createLanguageField(content.sectionSr, content.sectionEn, renderMarkdown, { sr: paths.sectionSr, en: paths.sectionEn }),
        lessons: createLanguageField(content.lessonsSr, content.lessonsEn, renderMarkdown, { sr: paths.lessonsSr, en: paths.lessonsEn }),
        theory: createLanguageField(content.theorySr, content.theoryEn, renderMarkdown, { sr: paths.theorySr, en: paths.theoryEn }),
        theoryLevels: (content.theoryEasySr || content.theoryEasyEn || content.theoryProSr || content.theoryProEn)
            ? {
                sr: {
                    easy: content.theoryEasySr ? renderMarkdown(content.theoryEasySr, { sourcePath: paths.theoryEasySr }) : '',
                    pro: content.theoryProSr ? renderMarkdown(content.theoryProSr, { sourcePath: paths.theoryProSr }) : ''
                },
                en: {
                    easy: content.theoryEasyEn ? renderMarkdown(content.theoryEasyEn, { sourcePath: paths.theoryEasyEn }) : '',
                    pro: content.theoryProEn ? renderMarkdown(content.theoryProEn, { sourcePath: paths.theoryProEn }) : ''
                }
            }
            : undefined,
        preview: createLanguageField(content.previewSr, content.previewEn, parsePreviewMarkdown, { sr: paths.previewSr, en: paths.previewEn }),
        quiz: createLanguageField(content.quizSr, content.quizEn, parseQuizMarkdown)
    };
}

function ensureLessonCopyDefaults(lesson) {
    if (!lesson.titleByLanguage) {
        lesson.titleByLanguage = {
            sr: lesson.title,
            en: lesson.title
        };
    }

    if (!lesson.metaByLanguage) {
        lesson.metaByLanguage = {
            sr: Array.isArray(lesson.meta) ? cloneValue(lesson.meta) : [],
            en: Array.isArray(lesson.meta) ? cloneValue(lesson.meta) : []
        };
    }

    if (!lesson.controlLabelsDefault) {
        lesson.controlLabelsDefault = Object.fromEntries(
            (lesson.controls || []).map((control) => [control.key, control.label || control.key])
        );
    }

    if (!lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage) {
        lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage = {
            sr: cloneValue(lesson.controlLabelsDefault),
            en: cloneValue(lesson.controlLabelsDefault)
        };
    }
}

function applyLoadedCopy(lesson, loadedCopy, language) {
    ensureLessonCopyDefaults(lesson);

    lesson.titleByLanguage = mergeLanguageValue(lesson.titleByLanguage, loadedCopy.titleByLanguage);
    lesson.metaByLanguage = mergeLanguageValue(lesson.metaByLanguage, loadedCopy.metaByLanguage);
    lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage = mergeLanguageValue(lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage, loadedCopy.controlLabelsByLanguage);

    lesson.title = readLanguageValue(lesson.titleByLanguage, language, lesson.title);
    lesson.meta = readLanguageValue(lesson.metaByLanguage, language, lesson.meta) || [];

    const activeControlLabels = readLanguageValue(lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage, language, lesson.controlLabelsDefault) || {};
    (lesson.controls || []).forEach((control) => {
        control.label = activeControlLabels[control.key] || lesson.controlLabelsDefault[control.key] || control.key;
    });

    ['section', 'lessons', 'theory', 'theoryLevels', 'preview', 'quiz'].forEach((key) => {
        if (loadedCopy[key] !== undefined) {
            lesson[key] = cloneValue(loadedCopy[key]);
        }
    });
}

export async function ensureLessonCopyLoaded(lesson, language = 'sr') {
    if (!lesson || !lesson.contentPath) {
        return lesson;
    }

    const documentsPath = lesson.documentsPath || lesson.contentPath;

    if (!lessonCopyCache.has(documentsPath)) {
        lessonCopyCache.set(documentsPath, loadLessonCopyFromPath(documentsPath));
    }

    const loadedCopy = await lessonCopyCache.get(documentsPath);
    applyLoadedCopy(lesson, loadedCopy, language);
    return lesson;
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/content/read-lesson-diagram.js ===
import { findBasicsDiagram } from '../../01-basics/diagrams/basics-diagram-data.js';

export function findLessonDiagram({ sourcePath = '', mermaidSource = '' } = {}) {
    const normalizedPath = String(sourcePath || '').split('\\').join('/');

    if (normalizedPath.includes('/01-basics/')) {
        return findBasicsDiagram(mermaidSource);
    }

    return null;
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/content/render-markdown.js ===
import { findLessonDiagram } from './read-lesson-diagram.js';

function escapeHtml(text) {
    return String(text)
        .replaceAll('&', '&amp;')
        .replaceAll('<', '&lt;')
        .replaceAll('>', '&gt;');
}

function escapeAttribute(text) {
    return escapeHtml(text)
        .replaceAll('"', '&quot;')
        .replaceAll("'", '&#39;');
}

function stripMarkdownSyntax(text) {
    return String(text)
        .replace(/!\[([^\]]*)\]\(([^)]+)\)/g, '$1')
        .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\(([^)]+)\)/g, '$1')
        .replace(/[*_`~]/g, '')
        .trim();
}

function createHeadingId(text, usedHeadingIds) {
    const baseId = stripMarkdownSyntax(text)
        .normalize('NFKD')
        .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
        .toLowerCase()
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
        .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '') || 'section';

    const seenCount = usedHeadingIds.get(baseId) || 0;
    usedHeadingIds.set(baseId, seenCount + 1);

    return seenCount ? `${baseId}-${seenCount + 1}` : baseId;
}

function highlightCssValue(value) {
    return escapeHtml(value)
        .replace(/(\/\*.*?\*\/)/g, '<span class="token-comment">$1</span>')
        .replace(/([;{},])/g, '<span class="token-punctuation">$1</span>')
        .replace(/(#(?:[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}))/g, '<span class="token-value">$1</span>')
        .replace(/\b(\d+(?:\.\d+)?(?:px|rem|em|%|vh|vw|fr)?)\b/g, '<span class="token-number">$1</span>')
        .replace(/([a-z-]+)(?=\()/g, '<span class="token-function">$1</span>')
        .replace(/\b(display|flex|inline-flex|row|row-reverse|column|column-reverse|nowrap|wrap|wrap-reverse|center|flex-start|flex-end|space-between|space-around|space-evenly|stretch|baseline|auto|none|block|inline|relative|absolute)\b/g, '<span class="token-keyword">$1</span>');
}

function highlightCssCode(code) {
    return String(code)
        .split('\n')
        .map((line) => {
            const indent = line.match(/^\s*/)?.[0] || '';
            const trimmed = line.trim();

            if (!trimmed) {
                return '';
            }

            if (trimmed.startsWith('/*') && trimmed.endsWith('*/')) {
                return `${indent}<span class="token-comment">${escapeHtml(trimmed)}</span>`;
            }

            if (trimmed === '{' || trimmed === '}') {
                return `${indent}<span class="token-punctuation">${escapeHtml(trimmed)}</span>`;
            }

            if (trimmed.startsWith('@')) {
                const atRuleLine = escapeHtml(trimmed)
                    .replace(/^(@[a-z-]+)/, '<span class="token-atrule">$1</span>')
                    .replace(/([;{},])/g, '<span class="token-punctuation">$1</span>');
                return `${indent}${atRuleLine}`;
            }

            if (trimmed.includes('{')) {
                const openBraceIndex = line.indexOf('{');
                const selector = line.slice(0, openBraceIndex).trimEnd();
                const suffix = line.slice(openBraceIndex + 1);
                return `${indent}<span class="token-selector">${escapeHtml(selector.trim())}</span><span class="token-punctuation">{</span>${highlightCssValue(suffix)}`;
            }

            if (trimmed.includes(':')) {
                const propertyIndex = line.indexOf(':');
                const property = line.slice(0, propertyIndex);
                const value = line.slice(propertyIndex + 1);
                return `${indent}<span class="token-property">${escapeHtml(property.trim())}</span><span class="token-punctuation">:</span>${highlightCssValue(value)}`;
            }

            return `${indent}${highlightCssValue(trimmed)}`;
        })
        .join('\n');
}

function renderCodeBlock(code, language) {
    const normalizedLanguage = (language || '').trim();
    if (normalizedLanguage === 'css') {
        return `<pre class="lesson-code-block"><code class="language-css">${highlightCssCode(code)}</code></pre>`;
    }

    const escapedCode = escapeHtml(code);
    const languageClass = normalizedLanguage ? ` class="language-${escapeHtml(normalizedLanguage)}"` : '';
    return `<pre class="lesson-code-block"><code${languageClass}>${escapedCode}</code></pre>`;
}

function renderCssCompareBlock(code) {
    const rawPanels = [];
    let currentPanel = [];

    String(code).split('\n').forEach((line) => {
        if (line.trim() === '---') {
            rawPanels.push(currentPanel.join('\n'));
            currentPanel = [];
            return;
        }

        currentPanel.push(line);
    });

    rawPanels.push(currentPanel.join('\n'));

    const panels = rawPanels
        .map((panelSource, index) => {
            const lines = panelSource.split('\n');
            const firstLine = lines[0] ? lines[0].trim() : '';
            const titleMatch = firstLine.match(/^@(left|right)\s+(.+)$/);
            const title = titleMatch
                ? titleMatch[2].trim()
                : (index === 0 ? 'Parent CSS' : 'Child CSS');
            const codeBody = titleMatch ? lines.slice(1).join('\n').trim() : panelSource.trim();

            return {
                title,
                code: codeBody
            };
        })
        .filter((panel) => panel.code);

    if (!panels.length) {
        return renderCodeBlock(code, 'css');
    }

    return `<div class="lesson-code-compare">${panels.map((panel) => `
        <section class="lesson-code-panel">
            <div class="lesson-code-panel-title">${escapeHtml(panel.title)}</div>
            ${renderCodeBlock(panel.code, 'css')}
        </section>
    `).join('')}</div>`;
}

function renderLessonDiagram(mermaidSource, options = {}) {
    const diagram = findLessonDiagram({
        sourcePath: options.sourcePath,
        mermaidSource
    });

    if (!diagram) {
        const escapedCode = escapeHtml(mermaidSource);
        return `<pre class="mermaid-inline">${escapedCode}</pre>`;
    }

    return `<figure class="lesson-diagram"><img class="lesson-diagram-image" src="${escapeAttribute(diagram.src)}" alt="${escapeAttribute(diagram.alt)}" loading="lazy"></figure>`;
}

function renderInlineMarkdown(text) {
    return text
        .replace(/!\[([^\]]*)\]\(([^)]+)\)/g, (_, alt, src) => `<img class="lesson-markdown-image" src="${escapeAttribute(src)}" alt="${escapeAttribute(alt)}">`)
        .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\(([^)]+)\)/g, (_, label, href) => {
            const safeHref = escapeAttribute(href);
            if (String(href).startsWith('#')) {
                return `<a href="${safeHref}">${label}</a>`;
            }

            return `<a href="${safeHref}" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">${label}</a>`;
        })
        .replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
        .replace(/\*(.+?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
        .replace(/`(.+?)`/g, '<code>$1</code>');
}

function flushParagraph(buffer, htmlParts) {
    if (!buffer.length) {
        return;
    }

    htmlParts.push(`<p>${renderInlineMarkdown(buffer.join(' '))}</p>`);
    buffer.length = 0;
}

function flushList(listState, htmlParts) {
    if (!listState.items.length) {
        return;
    }

    const tagName = listState.type === 'ordered' ? 'ol' : 'ul';
    htmlParts.push(`<${tagName}>${listState.items.map((item) => `<li>${renderInlineMarkdown(item)}</li>`).join('')}</${tagName}>`);
    listState.type = null;
    listState.items = [];
}

export function renderMarkdown(markdown, options = {}) {
    if (!markdown) {
        return '';
    }

    const trimmedMarkdown = String(markdown).trim();
    if (!trimmedMarkdown) {
        return '';
    }

    const htmlParts = [];
    const paragraphBuffer = [];
    const listState = { type: null, items: [] };
    const usedHeadingIds = new Map();
    let inCodeBlock = false;
    let inHtmlBlock = false;
    let codeFenceLanguage = '';
    let codeBuffer = [];

    trimmedMarkdown.split('\n').forEach((line) => {
        const trimmedLine = line.trim();

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('```')) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);

            if (!inCodeBlock) {
                inCodeBlock = true;
                codeFenceLanguage = trimmedLine.slice(3).trim();
                codeBuffer = [];
                return;
            }

            if (codeFenceLanguage === 'mermaid') {
                htmlParts.push(renderLessonDiagram(codeBuffer.join('\n'), options));
            } else if (codeFenceLanguage === 'css-compare') {
                htmlParts.push(renderCssCompareBlock(codeBuffer.join('\n')));
            } else {
                htmlParts.push(renderCodeBlock(codeBuffer.join('\n'), codeFenceLanguage));
            }

            inCodeBlock = false;
            codeFenceLanguage = '';
            codeBuffer = [];
            return;
        }

        if (inCodeBlock) {
            codeBuffer.push(line);
            return;
        }

        if (!trimmedLine) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            return;
        }

        if (/^---+$/.test(trimmedLine)) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            htmlParts.push('<hr>');
            return;
        }

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('# ')) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            const headingText = trimmedLine.slice(2).trim();
            const headingId = createHeadingId(headingText, usedHeadingIds);
            htmlParts.push(`<h1 id="${escapeAttribute(headingId)}">${renderInlineMarkdown(headingText)}</h1>`);
            return;
        }

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('## ')) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            const headingText = trimmedLine.slice(3).trim();
            const headingId = createHeadingId(headingText, usedHeadingIds);
            htmlParts.push(`<h2 id="${escapeAttribute(headingId)}">${renderInlineMarkdown(headingText)}</h2>`);
            return;
        }

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('### ')) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            const headingText = trimmedLine.slice(4).trim();
            const headingId = createHeadingId(headingText, usedHeadingIds);
            htmlParts.push(`<h3 id="${escapeAttribute(headingId)}">${renderInlineMarkdown(headingText)}</h3>`);
            return;
        }

        if (trimmedLine.startsWith('#### ')) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            const headingText = trimmedLine.slice(5).trim();
            const headingId = createHeadingId(headingText, usedHeadingIds);
            htmlParts.push(`<h4 id="${escapeAttribute(headingId)}">${renderInlineMarkdown(headingText)}</h4>`);
            return;
        }

        if (/^[-*]\s+/.test(trimmedLine)) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            if (listState.type && listState.type !== 'unordered') {
                flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            }
            listState.type = 'unordered';
            listState.items.push(trimmedLine.replace(/^[-*]\s+/, ''));
            return;
        }

        if (/^\d+\.\s+/.test(trimmedLine)) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            if (listState.type && listState.type !== 'ordered') {
                flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            }
            listState.type = 'ordered';
            listState.items.push(trimmedLine.replace(/^\d+\.\s+/, ''));
            return;
        }

        if (/^>\s+/.test(trimmedLine)) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            htmlParts.push(`<blockquote>${renderInlineMarkdown(trimmedLine.replace(/^>\s+/, ''))}</blockquote>`);
            return;
        }

        if (inHtmlBlock || trimmedLine.startsWith('<')) {
            flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
            flushList(listState, htmlParts);
            htmlParts.push(line);
            
            if (trimmedLine.includes('</')) {
                inHtmlBlock = false;
            } else if (trimmedLine.startsWith('<') && !trimmedLine.includes('/>')) {
                inHtmlBlock = true;
            }
            return;
        }

        paragraphBuffer.push(trimmedLine);
    });

    flushParagraph(paragraphBuffer, htmlParts);
    flushList(listState, htmlParts);

    return htmlParts.join('\n');
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/content/sync-lesson-files.js ===
import fs from 'node:fs';
import path from 'node:path';
import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';

const currentDir = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const lessonsRoot = path.resolve(currentDir, '../..');
const repoRoot = path.resolve(lessonsRoot, '../..');

const partOrder = [
    { key: 'preview', heading: 'Lesson Preview' },
    { key: 'section', heading: 'Section Overview' },
    { key: 'lessons', heading: 'Lesson Flow' },
    { key: 'theory-easy', heading: 'Easy View' },
    { key: 'theory-pro', heading: 'Pro View' },
    { key: 'theory', heading: 'Theory' },
    { key: 'quiz', heading: 'Quiz' },
    { key: 'controls', heading: 'Lab Controls Appendix' }
];

const groupBookConfig = {
    '01-basics': { title: 'Basics', fileName: 'basic.md' },
    '02-flexbox': { title: 'Flexbox', fileName: 'flexbox.md' },
    '03-css-grid': { title: 'CSS Grid', fileName: 'css_grid.md' },
    '04-layout': { title: 'Layout', fileName: 'layout.md' },
    '05-advanced': { title: 'Advanced', fileName: 'advanced.md' },
    '06-modern-app-layouts': { title: 'Modern App Layouts', fileName: 'modern_app_layouts.md' },
    '07-web-components-in-product': { title: 'Web Components in Product', fileName: 'web_components_in_product.md' }
};

const latinMap = {
    a: 'a', b: 'b', c: 'c', d: 'd', e: 'e', f: 'f', g: 'g', h: 'h', i: 'i', j: 'j', k: 'k', l: 'l', m: 'm',
    n: 'n', o: 'o', p: 'p', q: 'q', r: 'r', s: 's', t: 't', u: 'u', v: 'v', w: 'w', x: 'x', y: 'y', z: 'z',
    A: 'a', B: 'b', C: 'c', D: 'd', E: 'e', F: 'f', G: 'g', H: 'h', I: 'i', J: 'j', K: 'k', L: 'l', M: 'm',
    N: 'n', O: 'o', P: 'p', Q: 'q', R: 'r', S: 's', T: 't', U: 'u', V: 'v', W: 'w', X: 'x', Y: 'y', Z: 'z',
    č: 'c', ć: 'c', ž: 'z', š: 's', đ: 'dj',
    Č: 'c', Ć: 'c', Ž: 'z', Š: 's', Đ: 'dj'
};

function toPosix(input) {
    return String(input || '').split(path.sep).join('/');
}

function collectLessonRoots(rootDir, collected = []) {
    const entries = fs.readdirSync(rootDir, { withFileTypes: true });

    entries.forEach((entry) => {
        if (!entry.isDirectory() || entry.name === 'shared' || entry.name === 'tests') {
            return;
        }

        const entryPath = path.join(rootDir, entry.name);
        const lessonContentPath = path.join(entryPath, 'content', 'lesson-content.js');

        if (fs.existsSync(lessonContentPath)) {
            collected.push(entryPath);
            return;
        }

        collectLessonRoots(entryPath, collected);
    });

    return collected.sort((leftPath, rightPath) => leftPath.localeCompare(rightPath));
}

function collectGroupRoots() {
    return fs.readdirSync(lessonsRoot, { withFileTypes: true })
        .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory() && entry.name !== 'shared' && entry.name !== 'tests')
        .map((entry) => path.join(lessonsRoot, entry.name))
        .sort((leftPath, rightPath) => leftPath.localeCompare(rightPath));
}

function stripFrontmatter(markdown) {
    const source = String(markdown || '');
    if (!source.startsWith('---\n')) {
        return source.trim();
    }

    const closingMarker = source.indexOf('\n---\n');
    if (closingMarker === -1) {
        return source.trim();
    }

    return source.slice(closingMarker + 5).trim();
}

function parseFrontmatter(markdown) {
    const source = String(markdown || '').trim();
    if (!source.startsWith('---\n')) {
        return { attributes: {}, body: source };
    }

    const match = source.match(/^---\n([\s\S]*?)\n---(?:\n|$)/);
    if (!match) {
        return { attributes: {}, body: source };
    }

    const attributes = {};
    let activeKey = null;

    match[1].split('\n').forEach((line) => {
        const trimmedLine = line.trim();
        if (!trimmedLine) {
            return;
        }

        const keyMatch = trimmedLine.match(/^([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+):\s*(.*)$/);
        if (keyMatch) {
            const [, key, rawValue] = keyMatch;
            if (rawValue) {
                attributes[key] = rawValue.trim();
                activeKey = null;
                return;
            }

            attributes[key] = [];
            activeKey = key;
            return;
        }

        const listItemMatch = trimmedLine.match(/^-\s+(.+)$/);
        if (listItemMatch && activeKey && Array.isArray(attributes[activeKey])) {
            attributes[activeKey].push(listItemMatch[1].trim());
        }
    });

    return {
        attributes,
        body: source.slice(match[0].length).trim()
    };
}

function stripGeneratedComment(markdown) {
    return String(markdown || '')
        .replace(/^<!-- Generated from the same markdown sources used by the web lesson(?:s in this group)?(?:s across the whole learning flow)?\. -->\s*/, '')
        .trim();
}

function readLessonDocumentsPath(lessonContentSource) {
    const documentsPathMatch = lessonContentSource.match(/documentsPath:\s*['"`]([^'"`]+)['"`]/);
    if (!documentsPathMatch) {
        return null;
    }

    return path.join(repoRoot, documentsPathMatch[1]);
}

function readLessonNavigationLabel(lessonRoot) {
    const entryPath = path.join(lessonRoot, 'index.js');
    if (!fs.existsSync(entryPath)) {
        return path.basename(lessonRoot);
    }

    const entrySource = fs.readFileSync(entryPath, 'utf8');
    const navigationLabelMatch = entrySource.match(/navigationLabel:\s*['"`]([^'"`]+)['"`]/);
    return navigationLabelMatch ? navigationLabelMatch[1] : path.basename(lessonRoot);
}

function normalizeFileName(rawLabel) {
    const label = String(rawLabel || '')
        .replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '')
        .trim();

    const ascii = Array.from(label)
        .map((character) => latinMap[character] || character)
        .join('')
        .toLowerCase()
        .replace(/&/g, ' and ')
        .replace(/\+/g, ' ')
        .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '_')
        .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, '')
        .replace(/_+/g, '_');

    return `${ascii || 'lesson'}.md`;
}

function resolvePartPath(documentsPath, key, preferredLanguage) {
    const fallbackLanguage = preferredLanguage === 'sr' ? 'en' : 'sr';
    const preferredPath = path.join(documentsPath, `${key}.${preferredLanguage}.md`);
    if (fs.existsSync(preferredPath)) {
        return { path: preferredPath, language: preferredLanguage };
    }

    const fallbackPath = path.join(documentsPath, `${key}.${fallbackLanguage}.md`);
    if (fs.existsSync(fallbackPath)) {
        return { path: fallbackPath, language: fallbackLanguage };
    }

    return null;
}

function startsWithHeading(markdown) {
    return /^\s*#{1,6}\s/.test(markdown);
}

function shiftMarkdownHeadings(markdown, depth) {
    if (!depth) {
        return String(markdown || '');
    }

    let insideFence = false;

    return String(markdown || '')
        .split('\n')
        .map((line) => {
            const trimmedLine = line.trim();
            if (trimmedLine.startsWith('```')) {
                insideFence = !insideFence;
                return line;
            }

            if (insideFence) {
                return line;
            }

            const headingMatch = line.match(/^(#{1,6})\s+(.*)$/);
            if (!headingMatch) {
                return line;
            }

            const nextDepth = Math.min(headingMatch[1].length + depth, 6);
            return `${'#'.repeat(nextDepth)} ${headingMatch[2]}`;
        })
        .join('\n');
}

function rewriteAssetPaths(markdown, outputFilePath) {
    const outputDir = path.dirname(outputFilePath);

    return String(markdown || '')
        .replace(/\((\/?assets\/[^)\s]+)\)/g, (match, assetUrl) => {
            const assetPath = path.join(repoRoot, assetUrl.replace(/^\/+/, ''));
            return `(${toPosix(path.relative(outputDir, assetPath))})`;
        })
        .replace(/src=(['"])(\/?assets\/[^'"]+)\1/g, (match, quote, assetUrl) => {
            const assetPath = path.join(repoRoot, assetUrl.replace(/^\/+/, ''));
            return `src=${quote}${toPosix(path.relative(outputDir, assetPath))}${quote}`;
        });
}

function buildPartBlock({ heading, body, preferredLanguage, language }) {
    const content = String(body || '').trim();
    if (!content) {
        return '';
    }

    const blocks = [];

    if (!startsWithHeading(content)) {
        blocks.push(`## ${heading}`);
    }

    if (language !== preferredLanguage) {
        const fallbackLabel = language === 'en' ? 'English' : 'Serbian';
        blocks.push(`> Ovaj deo koristi ${fallbackLabel} fallback jer izabrani dokument nije dostupan.`);
    }

    blocks.push(content);
    return blocks.join('\n\n');
}

function buildLessonBookData(documentsPath, bookFileName) {
    const lessonFileRef = resolvePartPath(documentsPath, 'lesson', 'sr') || resolvePartPath(documentsPath, 'lesson', 'en');
    if (!lessonFileRef) {
        return null;
    }

    const lessonSource = fs.readFileSync(lessonFileRef.path, 'utf8');
    const { attributes } = parseFrontmatter(lessonSource);
    const preferredLanguage = lessonFileRef.language;
    const displayTitle = attributes.title || path.basename(documentsPath).replace(/^\d+\.\s*/, '').trim();
    const meta = Array.isArray(attributes.meta) ? attributes.meta : [];
    const headerLines = ['<!-- Generated from the same markdown sources used by the web lesson. -->', `# ${displayTitle}`];

    if (meta.length) {
        headerLines.push(`_${meta.join(' · ')}_`);
    }

    const visibleBlocks = [headerLines.join('\n\n')];

    partOrder.forEach((part) => {
        const partRef = resolvePartPath(documentsPath, part.key, preferredLanguage);
        if (!partRef) {
            return;
        }

        const partSource = fs.readFileSync(partRef.path, 'utf8');
        const partBody = stripFrontmatter(partSource);
        const block = buildPartBlock({
            heading: part.heading,
            body: partBody,
            preferredLanguage,
            language: partRef.language
        });

        if (block) {
            visibleBlocks.push(block);
        }
    });

    return {
        title: displayTitle,
        markdown: visibleBlocks.join('\n\n---\n\n').replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n').trim() + '\n',
        fileName: bookFileName || normalizeFileName(path.basename(documentsPath))
    };
}

function buildBulletList(heading, items) {
    if (!items.length) {
        return '';
    }

    return [
        `## ${heading}`,
        '',
        ...items.map((item) => `- ${item}`)
    ].join('\n');
}

function buildRootContents(groups) {
    const lines = ['## Learning Flow', ''];

    groups.forEach((group) => {
        lines.push(`- ${group.title}`);
        group.lessonBooks.forEach((lessonBook) => {
            lines.push(`  - ${lessonBook.title}`);
        });
    });

    return lines.join('\n');
}

function buildGroupBook(groupInfo) {
    const intro = [
        '<!-- Generated from the same markdown sources used by the web lessons in this group. -->',
        `# ${groupInfo.title}`,
        '',
        '_Ova knjiga spaja sve lekcije iz ove grupe u istom redosledu kao u aplikaciji._'
    ].join('\n');

    const contents = buildBulletList(
        'Lessons in This Group',
        groupInfo.lessonBooks.map((lessonBook) => lessonBook.title)
    );

    const lessonSections = groupInfo.lessonBooks.map((lessonBook) => shiftMarkdownHeadings(stripGeneratedComment(lessonBook.markdown), 1));

    return [intro, contents, ...lessonSections]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .join('\n\n---\n\n')
        .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n')
        .trim() + '\n';
}

function buildRootBook(groupInfos) {
    const intro = [
        '<!-- Generated from the same markdown sources used by the web lessons across the whole learning flow. -->',
        '# Lessons',
        '',
        '_Ova knjiga spaja ceo learning flow: iste lekcije, isti redosled i isti markdown source koji koristi web aplikacija._'
    ].join('\n');

    const contents = buildRootContents(groupInfos);
    const groupSections = groupInfos.map((groupInfo) => shiftMarkdownHeadings(stripGeneratedComment(buildGroupBook(groupInfo)), 1));

    return [intro, contents, ...groupSections]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .join('\n\n---\n\n')
        .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n')
        .trim() + '\n';
}

function writeGeneratedMarkdown(filePath, markdown) {
    fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });
    fs.writeFileSync(filePath, rewriteAssetPaths(markdown, filePath));
}

function syncLessonFiles() {
    const lessonRoots = collectLessonRoots(lessonsRoot);
    const lessonBooks = lessonRoots.map((lessonRoot) => {
        const lessonContentPath = path.join(lessonRoot, 'content', 'lesson-content.js');
        const lessonContentSource = fs.readFileSync(lessonContentPath, 'utf8');
        const documentsPath = readLessonDocumentsPath(lessonContentSource);
        const navigationLabel = readLessonNavigationLabel(lessonRoot);

        if (!documentsPath || !fs.existsSync(documentsPath)) {
            return null;
        }

        const lessonBook = buildLessonBookData(documentsPath, normalizeFileName(navigationLabel));
        if (!lessonBook) {
            return null;
        }

        const relativePath = path.relative(lessonsRoot, lessonRoot);
        const [groupFolder] = relativePath.split(path.sep);

        return {
            ...lessonBook,
            lessonRoot,
            groupFolder
        };
    }).filter(Boolean);

    const writtenFiles = [];

    lessonBooks.forEach((lessonBook) => {
        const filePath = path.join(lessonBook.lessonRoot, 'content', 'documents', lessonBook.fileName);
        writeGeneratedMarkdown(filePath, lessonBook.markdown);
        writtenFiles.push(path.relative(repoRoot, filePath));

        fs.rmSync(path.join(lessonBook.lessonRoot, 'files'), { recursive: true, force: true });
    });

    const groupInfos = collectGroupRoots().map((groupRoot) => {
        const groupFolder = path.basename(groupRoot);
        const config = groupBookConfig[groupFolder] || {
            title: groupFolder.replace(/^\d+-/, '').replace(/-/g, ' '),
            fileName: normalizeFileName(groupFolder)
        };

        const lessonBooksForGroup = lessonBooks.filter((lessonBook) => lessonBook.groupFolder === groupFolder);
        if (!lessonBooksForGroup.length) {
            return null;
        }

        const groupBookMarkdown = buildGroupBook({
            title: config.title,
            lessonBooks: lessonBooksForGroup
        });
        const groupBookPath = path.join(groupRoot, config.fileName);

        writeGeneratedMarkdown(groupBookPath, groupBookMarkdown);
        writtenFiles.push(path.relative(repoRoot, groupBookPath));

        return {
            title: config.title,
            lessonBooks: lessonBooksForGroup,
            bookMarkdown: groupBookMarkdown
        };
    }).filter(Boolean);

    const rootBookPath = path.join(lessonsRoot, 'lessons.md');
    writeGeneratedMarkdown(rootBookPath, buildRootBook(groupInfos));
    writtenFiles.push(path.relative(repoRoot, rootBookPath));

    return writtenFiles;
}

const writtenFiles = syncLessonFiles();
console.log(`Synced ${writtenFiles.length} lesson book files.`);
writtenFiles.forEach((filePath) => console.log(filePath));

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/copy-lesson-definition.js ===
function cloneValue(value) {
    if (Array.isArray(value)) {
        return value.map(cloneValue);
    }

    if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
        return Object.fromEntries(
            Object.entries(value).map(([key, nestedValue]) => [key, cloneValue(nestedValue)])
        );
    }

    return value;
}

function assertLessonField(definition, key, label) {
    if (definition[key] === undefined || definition[key] === null) {
        throw new Error(`Lesson definition is missing "${label}".`);
    }
}

function validateLessonDefinition(definition) {
    assertLessonField(definition, 'id', 'id');
    assertLessonField(definition, 'cssPath', 'cssPath');
    assertLessonField(definition, 'contentPath', 'contentPath');
    assertLessonField(definition, 'documentsPath', 'documentsPath');
    assertLessonField(definition, 'state', 'state');
    assertLessonField(definition, 'controls', 'controls');
    assertLessonField(definition, 'render', 'render');
    assertLessonField(definition, 'cssGen', 'cssGen');

    if (!Array.isArray(definition.controls)) {
        throw new Error('Lesson definition must provide "controls" as an array.');
    }

    if (typeof definition.render !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('Lesson definition must provide "render" as a function.');
    }

    if (typeof definition.cssGen !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('Lesson definition must provide "cssGen" as a function.');
    }
}

export function copyLessonDefinition(definition) {
    validateLessonDefinition(definition);
    const lessonCopy = cloneValue(definition);

    if (typeof lessonCopy.title !== 'string') {
        lessonCopy.title = '';
    }

    if (!Array.isArray(lessonCopy.meta)) {
        lessonCopy.meta = [];
    }

    return lessonCopy;
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/create-lesson-entry.js ===
import { createOpenLesson } from './create-open-lesson.js';

function assertEntryField(value, label) {
    if (!value) {
        throw new Error(`Lesson entry is missing "${label}".`);
    }
}

export function createLessonEntry({
    lesson,
    sectionTitle,
    navigationLabel,
    icon,
    showCameraControls = false,
    updateScene
}) {
    if (!lesson || typeof lesson !== 'object') {
        throw new Error('Lesson entry must receive a lesson definition object.');
    }

    assertEntryField(lesson.id, 'lesson.id');
    assertEntryField(sectionTitle, 'sectionTitle');
    assertEntryField(navigationLabel, 'navigationLabel');
    assertEntryField(icon, 'icon');

    if (typeof showCameraControls !== 'boolean') {
        throw new Error('Lesson entry must define "showCameraControls" as a boolean.');
    }

    if (typeof updateScene !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('Lesson entry must define "updateScene" as a function.');
    }

    return Object.freeze({
        id: lesson.id,
        sectionTitle,
        navigationLabel,
        icon,
        showCameraControls,
        openLesson: createOpenLesson(lesson, updateScene)
    });
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/create-open-lesson.js ===
import { loadStylesheet } from '../../../shared/lib/load-stylesheet.js';
import { openLessonPage } from './open-lesson-page.js';
import { syncEditor } from './practice/actions/sync-editor.js';

export function createOpenLesson(lesson, updateScene) {
    return function openLesson() {
        return openLessonPage({
            lesson,
            loadStylesheet,
            syncEditor,
            updateScene
        });
    };
}
