=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/lesson-page/actions/connect-lesson-page-events.js ===
import { getLevelLabel } from '../state/create-lesson-page-state.js';
import { bindLabMode, syncLessonHtmlPreview, syncLessonLabView, syncSceneZoom } from '../render/show-lesson-page.js';

export function connectLessonPageEvents(page) {
    bindLevelToggle(page);
    bindQuiz(page);
    bindLabMode(page);
}

export function refreshLesson(page) {
    if (page.syncEditor) {
        page.syncEditor(page.lesson);
    }

    refreshLessonScene(page);
    syncLessonLabView(page);
}

export function refreshLessonScene(page) {
    if (page.updateScene) {
        page.updateScene(page.lesson.state, window.cameraRotation);
    }

    syncSceneZoom(page);
    syncLessonHtmlPreview(page);
}

function bindLevelToggle(page) {
    const root = document.getElementById('theory-content');
    if (!root) {
        return;
    }

    root.querySelectorAll('.level-btn').forEach((button) => {
        button.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const level = button.dataset.level;
            root.querySelectorAll('.level-btn').forEach((item) => item.classList.remove('active'));
            button.classList.add('active');

            const content = document.getElementById('lesson-level-content');
            const language = page.pageState.language || window.appLanguage || 'sr';
            const levelText = page.lesson.theoryLevels && page.lesson.theoryLevels[language] && page.lesson.theoryLevels[language][level]
                ? page.lesson.theoryLevels[language][level]
                : (
                    language === 'en'
                        ? `<p>${getLevelLabel(level, language)} content is not available.</p>`
                        : `<p>Sadržaj za nivo "${getLevelLabel(level, language)}" nije dostupan.</p>`
                );

            content.innerHTML = `<div class="${level}-level">${levelText}</div>`;
        });
    });
}

function bindQuiz(page) {
    const root = document.getElementById('theory-content');
    if (!root) {
        return;
    }

    const language = page.pageState.language || window.appLanguage || 'sr';
    const quiz = (page.lesson.quiz && page.lesson.quiz[language]) || [];
    const savedQuizAnswers = loadQuizAnswers(page.lesson.id);
    page.pageState.quizAnswers = savedQuizAnswers;

    const quizOptions = root.querySelectorAll('.quiz-option');
    quizOptions.forEach((button) => {
        const questionIndex = Number(button.dataset.question);
        const optionIndex = Number(button.dataset.index);
        const quizItem = quiz[questionIndex];
        if (!quizItem) {
            return;
        }

        showSavedQuizAnswer(questionIndex, quizItem, savedQuizAnswers);

        button.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const feedback = document.getElementById(`quiz-feedback-${questionIndex}`);
            if (!feedback) {
                return;
            }

            const answerIsCorrect = optionIndex === quizItem.answer;
            page.pageState.quizAnswers[questionIndex] = answerIsCorrect;
            saveQuizAnswers(page.lesson.id, page.pageState.quizAnswers);

            feedback.innerHTML = answerIsCorrect
                ? `<span class="feedback-correct">✔️ Tačno! ${quizItem.explanation || ''}</span>`
                : `<span class="feedback-wrong">❌ Netačno. ${quizItem.explanation || ''}</span>`;

            window.dispatchEvent(new Event('lessonScoreUpdated'));
            updateQuizProgress(page, quiz.length);
        });
    });

    const resetButton = document.getElementById('quiz-reset');
    if (resetButton) {
        resetButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
            page.pageState.quizAnswers = {};
            saveQuizAnswers(page.lesson.id, page.pageState.quizAnswers);
            void page.render();
        });
    }

    updateQuizProgress(page, quiz.length);
}

function showSavedQuizAnswer(questionIndex, quizItem, savedQuizAnswers) {
    if (savedQuizAnswers[questionIndex] === undefined) {
        return;
    }

    const feedback = document.getElementById(`quiz-feedback-${questionIndex}`);
    if (!feedback) {
        return;
    }

    feedback.innerHTML = savedQuizAnswers[questionIndex]
        ? `<span class="feedback-correct">✔️ Tačno! ${quizItem.explanation || ''}</span>`
        : `<span class="feedback-wrong">❌ Netačno. ${quizItem.explanation || ''}</span>`;
}

function updateQuizProgress(page, total) {
    const progress = document.getElementById('quiz-progress');
    const goal = document.getElementById('quiz-goal');
    if (!progress) {
        return;
    }

    const language = page.pageState.language || window.appLanguage || 'sr';
    const answered = Object.keys(page.pageState.quizAnswers || {}).length;
    const correct = Object.values(page.pageState.quizAnswers || {}).filter(Boolean).length;

    progress.textContent = language === 'en'
        ? `${answered}/${total} answered · ${correct}/${total} correct`
        : `${answered}/${total} odgovoreno · ${correct}/${total} tačno`;

    if (!goal) {
        return;
    }

    if (answered === total && correct === total) {
        goal.classList.add('goal-complete');
        goal.textContent = language === 'en'
            ? '🏆 Goal unlocked! All answers are correct.'
            : '🏆 Cilj zadovoljen! Svi odgovori tačni.';
        return;
    }

    goal.classList.remove('goal-complete');
    goal.textContent = language === 'en'
        ? '🎯 Solve every question correctly to unlock the goal.'
        : '🎯 Reši sve tačno da bi aktivirao cilj.';
}

function getQuizStorageKey(lessonId) {
    return `avax-lesson-quiz-${lessonId}`;
}

function saveQuizAnswers(lessonId, quizAnswers) {
    const key = getQuizStorageKey(lessonId);
    window.localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify({ answers: quizAnswers }));
}

function loadQuizAnswers(lessonId) {
    const key = getQuizStorageKey(lessonId);
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key);

    if (!raw) {
        return {};
    }

    try {
        const savedState = JSON.parse(raw);
        return savedState.answers || {};
    } catch (error) {
        return {};
    }
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/lesson-page/render/show-lesson-page.js ===
import { html, render } from '../../../../../shared/lib/template-engine.js';
import { renderControlRow } from '../../../../../shared/ui/render-control-row.js';
import { buildPreviewFallback, getLevelLabel, readLanguageText } from '../state/create-lesson-page-state.js';
import { syncPreviewCodePanel } from '../../practice/render/sync-code-panels.js';

const sceneStylesheetCache = new Map();

export function showLessonPreview(page) {
    const language = page.pageState.language || window.appLanguage || 'sr';
    const preview = (page.lesson.preview && page.lesson.preview[language])
        ? page.lesson.preview[language]
        : buildPreviewFallback(page.lesson, language);

    const previewBadge = language === 'en' ? 'LESSON PREVIEW' : 'PREGLED LEKCIJE';
    const quickTipsLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Quick Tips' : 'Brzi Saveti';
    const diagramLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Diagram' : 'Dijagram';
    const proTipsLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Tips and Tricks' : '💡 Tips and Tricks';
    const previewDiagram = fitPreviewDiagram(preview.mermaid || 'graph LR\n A-->B');

    page.pageState.previewHtml = html`
        <div class="lesson-preview">
            <div class="preview-header">
                <div>
                    <div class="preview-badge">🔎 ${previewBadge}</div>
                    <h3>${preview.title}</h3>
                    <p>${preview.description}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-grid">
                <div class="preview-block">
                    <div class="preview-block-title">🧠 ${quickTipsLabel}</div>
                    <ul>
                        ${preview.quickTips ? preview.quickTips.map((tip) => html`<li>${tip}</li>`) : ''}
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="preview-block">
                    <div class="preview-block-title">${preview.proTips ? proTipsLabel : diagramLabel}</div>
                    ${preview.proTips 
                        ? html`<div class="pro-tips-content">${preview.proTips}</div>`
                        : preview.diagramAsset
                            ? html`<figure class="lesson-diagram lesson-diagram--preview"><img class="lesson-diagram-image" src="${preview.diagramAsset.src}" alt="${preview.diagramAsset.alt}" loading="lazy"></figure>`
                            : html`<pre class="mermaid-inline mermaid-inline-preview">${previewDiagram}</pre>`
                    }
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
}

export function showLessonTheory(page) {
    const language = page.pageState.language || window.appLanguage || 'sr';
    const lessonMeta = Array.isArray(page.lesson.meta) ? page.lesson.meta : [];
    const section = readLanguageText(page.lesson.section, language, '');
    const lessons = readLanguageText(page.lesson.lessons, language, '');
    const rawTheory = readLanguageText(
        page.lesson.theory,
        language,
        language === 'en' ? '<p>Theory is not available yet.</p>' : '<p>Teorija još nije dostupna.</p>'
    );

    const easyText = page.lesson.theoryLevels && page.lesson.theoryLevels[language] && page.lesson.theoryLevels[language].easy
        ? page.lesson.theoryLevels[language].easy
        : (
            language === 'en'
                ? '<p>Easy view is not available. Read the main theory for a quick summary.</p>'
                : '<p>Laki nivo nije dostupan. Pročitaj glavnu teoriju za brzi pregled.</p>'
        );

    const proText = page.lesson.theoryLevels && page.lesson.theoryLevels[language] && page.lesson.theoryLevels[language].pro
        ? page.lesson.theoryLevels[language].pro
        : (
            language === 'en'
                ? '<p>Pro view is not available. Continue practicing in the lab.</p>'
                : '<p>Pro nivo nije dostupan. Nastavi vežbu u laboratoriji.</p>'
        );

    const quiz = (page.lesson.quiz && page.lesson.quiz[language]) ? page.lesson.quiz[language] : [];
    const easyLabel = getLevelLabel('easy', language);
    const proLabel = getLevelLabel('pro', language);

    const template = html`
        <div class="theory-meta">
            ${lessonMeta.map((tag) => html`<span class="meta-tag">${tag}</span>`)}
        </div>
        ${page.pageState.previewHtml}
        ${section ? html`<div class="section-intro">${section}</div>` : ''}
        ${lessons ? html`<div class="lesson-list">${lessons}</div>` : ''}

        <div class="level-switcher">
            <button class="level-btn active" data-level="easy">🧸 ${easyLabel}</button>
            <button class="level-btn" data-level="pro">🚀 ${proLabel}</button>
        </div>

        <div class="level-content" id="lesson-level-content">
            <div class="easy-level">${easyText}</div>
        </div>

        <div class="theory-main">${rawTheory}</div>

        ${quiz.length ? buildQuizHtml(quiz, language) : ''}
    `;

    render('theory-content', template);
}

export function showLessonScene(page) {
    const language = page.pageState.language || window.appLanguage || 'sr';
    const zoomLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Scene zoom controls' : 'Kontrole za uvecanje scene';
    const zoomOutLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Zoom out scene' : 'Umanji scenu';
    const zoomResetLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Reset scene zoom' : 'Vrati uvecanje scene';
    const zoomInLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Zoom in scene' : 'Uvecaj scenu';

    render('visual-root', `
        <div class="preview-viewport">
            <div class="preview-toolbar" aria-label="${zoomLabel}">
                <button type="button" class="preview-zoom-btn" data-preview-action="zoom-out" aria-label="${zoomOutLabel}">−</button>
                <button type="button" class="preview-zoom-btn preview-zoom-reset" data-preview-action="reset" aria-label="${zoomResetLabel}">↺</button>
                <button type="button" class="preview-zoom-btn" data-preview-action="zoom-in" aria-label="${zoomInLabel}">+</button>
                <span class="preview-zoom-level" data-preview-value="true">100%</span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-stage-wrap" data-preview-wrap="true">
                <div class="preview-stage-frame" data-preview-frame="true">
                    <div class="preview-stage" id="preview-stage">
                        ${page.lesson.render(page.lesson.state)}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    `);

    const root = document.getElementById('visual-root');
    if (!root) {
        return;
    }

    root.__scenePage = page;
    bindSceneZoom(root);
}

export function showLessonControls(page) {
    const englishControlLabels = page.lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage && page.lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage.en
        ? page.lesson.controlLabelsByLanguage.en
        : {};
    const controls = page.lesson.controls.map((control) => ({
        ...control,
        label: englishControlLabels[control.key] || control.label || control.key
    }));
    const selectors = page.lesson.sceneSelectors;
    const template = html`
        ${selectors ? html`
            <div class="lab-legend">
                <div class="lab-legend-title">Scene selectors</div>
                <div class="lab-legend-copy">
                    <div class="lab-legend-line"><strong>Parent class:</strong> <code>${selectors.parent}</code></div>
                    <div class="lab-legend-line"><strong>Child class:</strong> <code>${selectors.child}</code></div>
                </div>
                <div class="lab-legend-note">Parent = roditeljski container. Child = direktno dete koje ulazi u raspored.</div>
            </div>
        ` : ''}
        ${controls.map((control) => renderControlRow(control, page.lesson.state[control.key]))}
    `;
    render('controls-root', template);
}

export async function syncLessonHtmlPreview(page) {
    const preview = document.getElementById('html-preview');
    if (!preview) {
        return;
    }

    const stage = document.getElementById('preview-stage');
    const sceneRoot = stage ? stage.firstElementChild : null;
    const markup = sceneRoot ? sceneRoot.outerHTML : page.lesson.render(page.lesson.state);
    const editor = document.getElementById('css-editor');
    const editorCss = editor ? String(editor.value || '').trim() : '';
    const requestId = Number(page.__htmlPreviewRequest || 0) + 1;

    page.__htmlPreviewRequest = requestId;

    const css = await buildSceneCssPreview(page, sceneRoot, editorCss);
    if (page.__htmlPreviewRequest !== requestId) {
        return;
    }

    const previewSource = [
        '<!-- Scene HTML -->',
        formatHtmlPreview(markup),
        '',
        '/* Scene CSS */',
        css
    ].join('\n');

    syncPreviewCodePanel(previewSource);
}

export function syncLessonLabView(page) {
    const root = document.getElementById('lab-view-root');
    const switcher = document.getElementById('lab-mode-switch');
    if (!root || !switcher) {
        return;
    }

    const nextView = page.pageState.labView || 'css';
    root.dataset.labView = nextView;

    switcher.querySelectorAll('[data-lab-view]').forEach((button) => {
        button.classList.toggle('active', button.dataset.labView === nextView);
    });
}

export function showLessonMermaid() {
    const root = document.getElementById('theory-content');
    if (!root || !window.mermaid) {
        return;
    }

    bindDiagramZoom(root);
    bindDiagramDrag(root);

    root.querySelectorAll('.mermaid-inline').forEach((element) => {
        const code = element.textContent || element.innerText;
        const frame = document.createElement('div');
        const viewport = document.createElement('div');
        const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
        const scaleLabel = document.createElement('span');
        const isPreviewDiagram = element.classList.contains('mermaid-inline-preview');
        const defaultScale = 1;

        frame.className = 'diagram-frame';
        frame.dataset.diagramFitScale = String(defaultScale);

        scaleLabel.className = 'diagram-zoom-level';
        scaleLabel.dataset.diagramValue = 'true';
        scaleLabel.textContent = `${Math.round(defaultScale * 100)}%`;

        viewport.className = 'diagram-viewport';
        wrapper.className = isPreviewDiagram
            ? 'mermaid mermaid-preview diagram-canvas'
            : 'mermaid diagram-canvas';
        wrapper.textContent = code;

        frame.innerHTML = `
            <div class="diagram-toolbar">
                <button type="button" class="diagram-zoom-btn" data-diagram-action="zoom-out" aria-label="Zoom out dijagrama">−</button>
                <button type="button" class="diagram-zoom-btn diagram-zoom-reset" data-diagram-action="reset" aria-label="Prilagodi dijagram okviru">Fit</button>
                <button type="button" class="diagram-zoom-btn" data-diagram-action="zoom-in" aria-label="Zoom in dijagrama">+</button>
            </div>
        `;

        frame.querySelector('.diagram-toolbar').insertBefore(scaleLabel, frame.querySelector('[data-diagram-action="zoom-in"]'));
        viewport.appendChild(wrapper);
        frame.appendChild(viewport);
        element.replaceWith(frame);

        applyDiagramScale(frame, defaultScale);
    });

    window.mermaid.init(undefined, root.querySelectorAll('.mermaid'));
    
    // Initial fit with delay for rendering
    setTimeout(() => fitRenderedDiagrams(root), 250);

    // Watch for size changes (window resize or panel collapse)
    if (!window.diagramObserver) {
        window.diagramObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => fitRenderedDiagrams(root));
        window.diagramObserver.observe(root);
    }
}

function fitPreviewDiagram(diagram) {
    return String(diagram)
        .replace(/^flowchart\s+LR\b/m, 'flowchart TD')
        .replace(/^flowchart\s+RL\b/m, 'flowchart TD')
        .replace(/^graph\s+LR\b/m, 'graph TD')
        .replace(/^graph\s+RL\b/m, 'graph TD');
}

function formatHtmlPreview(markup) {
    const compactMarkup = String(markup || '')
        .replace(/>\s+</g, '><')
        .trim();

    if (!compactMarkup) {
        return '';
    }

    const tokens = compactMarkup.replace(/></g, '>\n<').split('\n');
    let depth = 0;

    return tokens.map((token) => {
        const trimmedToken = token.trim();

        if (/^<\//.test(trimmedToken)) {
            depth = Math.max(depth - 1, 0);
        }

        const line = `${'  '.repeat(depth)}${trimmedToken}`;
        const opensBlock = /^<([a-z0-9-]+)(\s[^>]*)?>$/i.test(trimmedToken);
        const closesInline = /<\/[a-z0-9-]+>$/i.test(trimmedToken);
        const isVoid = /^<(area|base|br|col|embed|hr|img|input|link|meta|param|source|track|wbr)\b/i.test(trimmedToken);

        if (opensBlock && !closesInline && !isVoid) {
            depth += 1;
        }

        return line;
    }).join('\n');
}

async function buildSceneCssPreview(page, sceneRoot, editorCss) {
    const selectorTokens = collectSceneSelectorTokens(sceneRoot);
    const stylesheetSource = await loadSceneStylesheet(page.stylePath);
    const stylesheetCss = filterRelevantCss(stylesheetSource, selectorTokens);
    const liveCss = filterRelevantCss(editorCss, selectorTokens);
    const sections = [];

    if (stylesheetCss) {
        sections.push(`/* Scene stylesheet */\n${stylesheetCss}`);
    }

    if (liveCss) {
        sections.push(`/* Live lesson CSS */\n${liveCss}`);
    }

    return sections.join('\n\n').trim() || '/* No scene CSS found for the current preview. */';
}

async function loadSceneStylesheet(stylePath) {
    if (!stylePath) {
        return '';
    }

    const href = new URL(stylePath, window.location.href).href;
    return readStylesheetSource(href, new Set());
}

async function readStylesheetSource(href, chain) {
    if (!href || chain.has(href)) {
        return '';
    }

    if (sceneStylesheetCache.has(href)) {
        return sceneStylesheetCache.get(href);
    }

    const nextChain = new Set(chain);
    nextChain.add(href);

    const pendingSource = fetch(href)
        .then((response) => (response.ok ? response.text() : ''))
        .then((cssSource) => expandStylesheetImports(cssSource, href, nextChain))
        .catch(() => '');

    sceneStylesheetCache.set(href, pendingSource);
    return pendingSource;
}

async function expandStylesheetImports(cssSource, href, chain) {
    const importPattern = /@import\s+(?:url\()?['"]?([^'")\s]+)['"]?\)?\s*;/g;
    let output = '';
    let lastIndex = 0;
    let match = importPattern.exec(cssSource);

    while (match) {
        output += cssSource.slice(lastIndex, match.index);
        output += '\n';
        output += await readStylesheetSource(new URL(match[1], href).href, chain);
        output += '\n';
        lastIndex = match.index + match[0].length;
        match = importPattern.exec(cssSource);
    }

    output += cssSource.slice(lastIndex);
    return output.trim();
}

function collectSceneSelectorTokens(sceneRoot) {
    const selectors = {
        classes: new Set(),
        ids: new Set(),
        attributes: new Set(),
        tags: new Set()
    };

    if (!sceneRoot) {
        return selectors;
    }

    const elements = [sceneRoot, ...sceneRoot.querySelectorAll('*')];
    elements.forEach((element) => {
        selectors.tags.add(element.tagName.toLowerCase());

        if (element.id) {
            selectors.ids.add(`#${element.id}`);
        }

        element.classList.forEach((className) => {
            selectors.classes.add(`.${className}`);
        });

        element.getAttributeNames().forEach((attributeName) => {
            selectors.attributes.add(`[${attributeName}]`);
            selectors.attributes.add(`[${attributeName}="${element.getAttribute(attributeName)}"]`);
        });
    });

    return selectors;
}

function filterRelevantCss(source, selectorTokens) {
    const cssSource = String(source || '').trim();
    if (!cssSource) {
        return '';
    }

    return filterCssBlocks(cssSource, selectorTokens).trim();
}

function filterCssBlocks(source, selectorTokens) {
    return parseCssBlocks(source)
        .map((block) => filterCssBlock(block, selectorTokens))
        .filter(Boolean)
        .join('\n\n');
}

function filterCssBlock(block, selectorTokens) {
    const header = block.header.trim();
    const body = block.body.trim();

    if (!header || !body) {
        return '';
    }

    if (header.startsWith('@')) {
        const nested = filterCssBlocks(body, selectorTokens);
        if (!nested) {
            return '';
        }

        return `${header} {\n${indentCss(nested)}\n}`;
    }

    if (!selectorHeaderMatches(header, selectorTokens)) {
        return '';
    }

    return `${header} {\n${body}\n}`;
}

function parseCssBlocks(source) {
    const blocks = [];
    let index = 0;

    while (index < source.length) {
        const openIndex = source.indexOf('{', index);
        if (openIndex === -1) {
            break;
        }

        const header = source.slice(index, openIndex).trim();
        let depth = 1;
        let cursor = openIndex + 1;

        while (cursor < source.length && depth > 0) {
            const character = source[cursor];
            if (character === '{') {
                depth += 1;
            } else if (character === '}') {
                depth -= 1;
            }
            cursor += 1;
        }

        blocks.push({
            header,
            body: source.slice(openIndex + 1, Math.max(openIndex + 1, cursor - 1))
        });

        index = cursor;
    }

    return blocks;
}

function selectorHeaderMatches(header, selectorTokens) {
    return header
        .split(',')
        .some((selector) => selectorMatches(selector, selectorTokens));
}

function selectorMatches(selector, selectorTokens) {
    const normalizedSelector = selector.replace(/::?[a-zA-Z-]+(?:\([^)]*\))?/g, '');
    const classMatches = normalizedSelector.match(/\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/g) || [];
    const idMatches = normalizedSelector.match(/#[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/g) || [];
    const attributeMatches = normalizedSelector.match(/\[[^\]]+\]/g) || [];

    if (classMatches.some((token) => selectorTokens.classes.has(token))) {
        return true;
    }

    if (idMatches.some((token) => selectorTokens.ids.has(token))) {
        return true;
    }

    if (attributeMatches.some((token) => selectorTokens.attributes.has(token))) {
        return true;
    }

    if (classMatches.length || idMatches.length || attributeMatches.length) {
        return false;
    }

    const tagMatches = normalizedSelector.match(/\b[a-z][a-z0-9-]*\b/gi) || [];
    return tagMatches.some((token) => selectorTokens.tags.has(token.toLowerCase()));
}

function indentCss(source) {
    return String(source)
        .split('\n')
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join('\n');
}

function bindDiagramZoom(root) {
    if (root.dataset.diagramZoomBound === 'true') {
        return;
    }

    root.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
        const button = event.target.closest('[data-diagram-action]');
        if (!button) {
            return;
        }

        const frame = button.closest('.diagram-frame');
        if (!frame) {
            return;
        }

        const currentScale = Number(frame.dataset.diagramScale || 1);
        const nextScale = readNextDiagramScale(button.dataset.diagramAction, currentScale, frame);
        applyDiagramScale(frame, nextScale);
    });

    root.dataset.diagramZoomBound = 'true';
}

function bindDiagramDrag(root) {
    if (root.dataset.diagramDragBound === 'true') {
        return;
    }

    root.addEventListener('mousedown', (event) => {
        const viewport = event.target.closest('.diagram-viewport');
        if (!viewport) {
            return;
        }

        // Only drag if it's scrollable or zoomed
        const isScrollable = viewport.scrollWidth > viewport.clientWidth || viewport.scrollHeight > viewport.clientHeight;
        if (!isScrollable) {
            return;
        }

        let isDragging = true;
        let startX = event.pageX - viewport.offsetLeft;
        let startY = event.pageY - viewport.offsetTop;
        let scrollLeft = viewport.scrollLeft;
        let scrollTop = viewport.scrollTop;

        viewport.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
        viewport.style.userSelect = 'none';

        const onMouseMove = (e) => {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            e.preventDefault();
            const x = e.pageX - viewport.offsetLeft;
            const y = e.pageY - viewport.offsetTop;
            const walkX = (x - startX);
            const walkY = (y - startY);
            viewport.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walkX;
            viewport.scrollTop = scrollTop - walkY;
        };

        const onMouseUp = () => {
            isDragging = false;
            viewport.style.cursor = 'grab';
            viewport.style.removeProperty('user-select');
            window.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
            window.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
        };

        window.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
        window.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
    });

    // Touch Support for Diagram Panning
    root.addEventListener('touchstart', (event) => {
        const viewport = event.target.closest('.diagram-viewport');
        if (!viewport || event.touches.length !== 1) return;

        let startX = event.touches[0].pageX - viewport.offsetLeft;
        let startY = event.touches[0].pageY - viewport.offsetTop;
        let scrollLeft = viewport.scrollLeft;
        let scrollTop = viewport.scrollTop;

        const onTouchMove = (e) => {
            if (e.touches.length !== 1) return;
            const x = e.touches[0].pageX - viewport.offsetLeft;
            const y = e.touches[0].pageY - viewport.offsetTop;
            const walkX = (x - startX);
            const walkY = (y - startY);
            viewport.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walkX;
            viewport.scrollTop = scrollTop - walkY;
            e.preventDefault();
        };

        const onTouchEnd = () => {
            window.removeEventListener('touchmove', onTouchMove);
            window.removeEventListener('touchend', onTouchEnd);
        };

        window.addEventListener('touchmove', onTouchMove, { passive: false });
        window.addEventListener('touchend', onTouchEnd);
    }, { passive: false });

    // Initial cursor hint
    root.querySelectorAll('.diagram-viewport').forEach(v => {
        v.style.cursor = 'grab';
    });

    root.dataset.diagramDragBound = 'true';
}

function readNextDiagramScale(action, currentScale, frame) {
    if (action === 'zoom-in') {
        return Math.min(1.6, Number((currentScale + 0.1).toFixed(2)));
    }

    if (action === 'zoom-out') {
        return Math.max(0.1, Number((currentScale - 0.1).toFixed(2)));
    }

    return Number(frame.dataset.diagramFitScale || 1);
}

function fitRenderedDiagrams(root) {
    root.querySelectorAll('.diagram-frame').forEach((frame) => {
        const viewport = frame.querySelector('.diagram-viewport');
        const svg = frame.querySelector('svg');
        if (!viewport || !svg) {
            return;
        }

        const size = readDiagramSize(svg);
        if (!size.width || !size.height) {
            return;
        }

        // We want to fit within the actual viewport, not hardcoded theoretical heights
        const targetWidth = viewport.clientWidth - 32;
        const targetHeight = viewport.clientHeight - 32;
        
        const widthScale = targetWidth / size.width;
        const heightScale = targetHeight / size.height;
        
        // Logical fitting: Previews (which are often tall flowcharts) only fit to width
        // so they stay readable and scrollable. Theory/Lab diagrams fit to both.
        const isPreview = frame.closest('.preview-block');
        const fitScaleRaw = isPreview 
            ? Math.max(0.45, widthScale) // Readability floor for previews
            : Math.min(widthScale, heightScale);

        const fitScale = Math.max(0.05, Math.min(1.0, Number(fitScaleRaw.toFixed(2))));

        frame.dataset.diagramFitScale = String(fitScale);
        applyDiagramScale(frame, fitScale);
    });
}

function readDiagramSize(svg) {
    const viewBox = svg.viewBox && svg.viewBox.baseVal;
    if (viewBox && viewBox.width && viewBox.height) {
        return {
            width: viewBox.width,
            height: viewBox.height
        };
    }

    const width = svg.width && svg.width.baseVal ? svg.width.baseVal.value : svg.getBoundingClientRect().width;
    const height = svg.height && svg.height.baseVal ? svg.height.baseVal.value : svg.getBoundingClientRect().height;

    return { width, height };
}

function applyDiagramScale(frame, scale) {
    frame.dataset.diagramScale = String(scale);
    frame.style.setProperty('--diagram-scale', scale);

    const svg = frame.querySelector('svg');
    if (svg) {
        // Prevents SVG clipping when it's really small or really large
        svg.style.overflow = 'visible';
    }

    const label = frame.querySelector('[data-diagram-value]');
    if (label) {
        label.textContent = `${Math.round(scale * 100)}%`;
    }
}

function bindSceneZoom(root) {
    if (root.dataset.previewZoomBound === 'true') {
        return;
    }

    root.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
        const button = event.target.closest('[data-preview-action]');
        if (!button) {
            return;
        }

        const page = root.__scenePage;
        if (!page) {
            return;
        }

        const currentScale = Number(page.pageState.sceneScale || 1);
        page.pageState.sceneScale = readNextSceneScale(button.dataset.previewAction, currentScale);
        syncSceneZoom(page);
    });

    root.dataset.previewZoomBound = 'true';
}

function readNextSceneScale(action, currentScale) {
    if (action === 'zoom-in') {
        return Math.min(2, Number((currentScale + 0.1).toFixed(2)));
    }

    if (action === 'zoom-out') {
        return Math.max(0.6, Number((currentScale - 0.1).toFixed(2)));
    }

    return 1;
}

export function syncSceneZoom(page) {
    const root = document.getElementById('visual-root');
    if (!root) {
        return;
    }

    const stage = root.querySelector('#preview-stage');
    const frame = root.querySelector('[data-preview-frame]');
    const wrap = root.querySelector('[data-preview-wrap]');
    const sceneRoot = stage ? stage.firstElementChild : null;
    if (!stage || !frame || !wrap) {
        return;
    }

    const nextScale = Number(page.pageState.sceneScale || 1);
    const availableWidth = Math.max(1, Math.floor(wrap.clientWidth));

    stage.style.transform = 'none';
    stage.style.removeProperty('width');
    stage.style.removeProperty('height');
    frame.style.removeProperty('width');
    frame.style.removeProperty('height');

    if (availableWidth > 1) {
        frame.style.width = `${availableWidth}px`;
        stage.style.width = `${availableWidth}px`;
    }

    const target = sceneRoot || stage;
    const bounds = target.getBoundingClientRect();
    const baseWidth = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(target.scrollWidth || bounds.width));
    const baseHeight = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(target.scrollHeight || bounds.height));

    stage.style.width = `${baseWidth}px`;
    stage.style.height = `${baseHeight}px`;
    stage.style.transform = `scale(${nextScale})`;
    frame.style.width = `${Math.ceil(baseWidth * nextScale)}px`;
    frame.style.height = `${Math.ceil(baseHeight * nextScale)}px`;
    wrap.dataset.previewZoomed = nextScale > 1 ? 'true' : 'false';

    const label = root.querySelector('[data-preview-value]');
    if (label) {
        label.textContent = `${Math.round(nextScale * 100)}%`;
    }
}

export function bindLabMode(page) {
    const switcher = document.getElementById('lab-mode-switch');
    if (!switcher) {
        return;
    }

    switcher.__labPage = page;

    if (switcher.dataset.labModeBound === 'true') {
        syncLessonLabView(page);
        return;
    }

    switcher.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
        const button = event.target.closest('[data-lab-view]');
        if (!button) {
            return;
        }

        const activePage = switcher.__labPage;
        if (!activePage) {
            return;
        }

        activePage.pageState.labView = button.dataset.labView || 'css';
        syncLessonLabView(activePage);
    });

    switcher.dataset.labModeBound = 'true';
    syncLessonLabView(page);
}

function buildQuizHtml(quiz, language) {
    const quizTitle = language === 'en' ? 'Next Step Quiz' : 'Kviz Za Sledeći Korak';
    const resetLabel = language === 'en' ? 'Retry Quiz' : 'Ponovi Kviz';
    const goalLabel = language === 'en'
        ? 'Solve every question correctly to unlock the goal.'
        : 'Reši sve tačno da bi aktivirao cilj.';

    return html`
        <div class="lesson-quiz">
            <div class="quiz-header-row">
                <div class="quiz-title-row">
                    <div class="quiz-title">📝 ${quizTitle}</div>
                    <div id="quiz-progress" class="quiz-progress">0/${quiz.length}</div>
                </div>
                <button id="quiz-reset" class="quiz-reset">↻ ${resetLabel}</button>
            </div>
            <div id="quiz-goal" class="quiz-goal">🎯 ${goalLabel}</div>
            ${quiz.map((question, index) => html`
                <div class="quiz-item" data-question="${index}">
                    <div class="quiz-question">${index + 1}. ${question.question}</div>
                    <div class="quiz-options">
                        ${question.options.map((option, optionIndex) => html`<button class="quiz-option" data-question="${index}" data-index="${optionIndex}">${option}</button>`)}
                    </div>
                    <div class="quiz-feedback" id="quiz-feedback-${index}"></div>
                </div>
            `)}
        </div>
    `;
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/lesson-page/state/create-lesson-page-state.js ===
export function createLessonPageState() {
    return {
        isActive: false,
        language: window.appLanguage || 'sr',
        previewHtml: '',
        quizAnswers: {},
        sceneScale: 1,
        labView: 'css'
    };
}

export function readLanguageText(content, language, fallback = '') {
    if (!content) {
        return fallback;
    }

    if (typeof content === 'string') {
        return content;
    }

    return content[language] || content.sr || content.en || fallback;
}

export function buildPreviewFallback(lesson, language) {
    if (language === 'en') {
        return {
            title: lesson.title,
            description: `Explore ${lesson.title} through controls, theory, and a quick quiz.`,
            mermaid: `graph LR\n    A[Start] --> B[${lesson.title}] --> C[Practice]`,
            quickTips: ['Adjust the controls', 'Compare the visual scene and CSS', 'Finish the quiz to confirm understanding']
        };
    }

    return {
        title: lesson.title,
        description: `Istraži lekciju ${lesson.title} kroz kontrole, vizuelnu scenu i kratki kviz.`,
        mermaid: `graph LR\n    A[Početak] --> B[${lesson.title}] --> C[Vežba]`,
        quickTips: ['Pomeri kontrole da vidiš promenu', 'Uporedi CSS i scenu', 'Reši kviz da potvrdiš znanje']
    };
}

export function getLevelLabel(level, language) {
    if (language === 'en') {
        return level === 'easy' ? 'Easy' : 'Pro';
    }

    return level === 'easy' ? 'Lako' : 'Pro';
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/open-lesson-page.js ===
import { copyLessonDefinition } from './copy-lesson-definition.js';
import { ensureLessonCopyLoaded } from './content/load-lesson-copy.js';
import { connectLessonPageEvents, refreshLesson, refreshLessonScene } from './lesson-page/actions/connect-lesson-page-events.js';
import { showLessonControls, showLessonMermaid, showLessonPreview, showLessonScene, showLessonTheory, syncLessonHtmlPreview, syncLessonLabView } from './lesson-page/render/show-lesson-page.js';
import { createLessonPageState } from './lesson-page/state/create-lesson-page-state.js';

class LessonPage {
    constructor({ lesson, stylePath, loadStylesheet, syncEditor, updateScene }) {
        this.lesson = copyLessonDefinition(lesson);
        this.stylePath = stylePath || lesson.cssPath;
        this.loadStylesheet = loadStylesheet;
        this.syncEditor = syncEditor;
        this.updateScene = updateScene;
        this.pageState = createLessonPageState();
    }

    setLanguage(language) {
        this.pageState.language = language;
    }

    activate() {
        this.pageState.isActive = true;
    }

    deactivate() {
        this.pageState.isActive = false;
    }

    async render() {
        const stylesheetReady = this.loadStylesheet && this.stylePath
            ? Promise.resolve(this.loadStylesheet(this.stylePath))
            : Promise.resolve();
        const copyReady = ensureLessonCopyLoaded(this.lesson, this.pageState.language || window.appLanguage || 'sr');

        await Promise.all([stylesheetReady, copyReady]);

        showLessonPreview(this);
        showLessonTheory(this);
        showLessonScene(this);
        showLessonControls(this);
        syncLessonHtmlPreview(this);
        syncLessonLabView(this);
        showLessonMermaid();
        connectLessonPageEvents(this);
        refreshLesson(this);
    }

    renderControls() {
        showLessonControls(this);
    }

    handleUpdate(key, value) {
        this.lesson.state[key] = value;
        this.refresh();
    }

    refresh() {
        refreshLesson(this);
    }

    refreshScene() {
        refreshLessonScene(this);
    }
}

export function openLessonPage(options) {
    return new LessonPage(options);
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/practice/actions/apply-editor-input.js ===
import { readControlValueFromCss } from '../read-control-value-from-css.js';
import { syncCssCodePanel } from '../render/sync-code-panels.js';

function setStatusPill(label, color) {
    const pill = document.getElementById('status-pill');
    if (!pill) {
        return;
    }

    pill.innerText = label;
    pill.style.color = color;
}

export function applyEditorInput(lesson, onSync) {
    const editor = document.getElementById('css-editor');
    if (!editor || !lesson) {
        return;
    }

    const css = editor.value;
    syncCssCodePanel();
    const styleTag = document.getElementById('live-styles');
    if (styleTag) {
        styleTag.textContent = css;
    }

    let changed = false;

    lesson.controls.forEach((control) => {
        const nextValue = readControlValueFromCss(control, css);
        if (nextValue === undefined) {
            return;
        }

        if (control.type === 'select' && Array.isArray(control.options) && !control.options.includes(nextValue)) {
            return;
        }

        if (lesson.state[control.key] !== nextValue) {
            lesson.state[control.key] = nextValue;
            changed = true;
        }
    });

    if (changed) {
        setStatusPill('AUTO-SYNCED', 'var(--brand-primary)');
        if (onSync) {
            onSync();
        }
        return;
    }

    setStatusPill('MODIFIED', 'var(--brand-secondary)');
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/practice/actions/sync-editor.js ===
import { syncCssCodePanel } from '../render/sync-code-panels.js';

function setStatusPill(label, color) {
    const pill = document.getElementById('status-pill');
    if (!pill) {
        return;
    }

    pill.innerText = label;
    if (color) {
        pill.style.color = color;
    }
}

export function syncEditor(lesson) {
    const editor = document.getElementById('css-editor');
    if (!editor || !lesson) {
        return;
    }

    editor.value = lesson.cssGen(lesson.state);
    syncCssCodePanel();
    setStatusPill('SYNCED', 'var(--brand-primary)');
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/practice/read-control-value-from-css.js ===
function escapePattern(text) {
    return text.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
}

function derivePropertyName(controlKey) {
    return controlKey.split(/(?=[A-Z])/).join('-').toLowerCase();
}

function normalizeValue(control, rawValue) {
    const trimmedValue = rawValue.trim();

    if (control.type === 'select') {
        return trimmedValue;
    }

    const numberMatch = trimmedValue.match(/-?\d*\.?\d+/);
    if (!numberMatch) {
        return trimmedValue;
    }

    return parseFloat(numberMatch[0]);
}

export function readMatchText(css, pattern) {
    const match = css.match(pattern);
    return match ? match[1].trim() : undefined;
}

export function readMatchNumber(css, pattern) {
    const match = css.match(pattern);
    return match ? parseFloat(match[1]) : undefined;
}

export function readTextProperty(css, propertyName) {
    return readMatchText(
        css,
        new RegExp(`(?:^|[;{\\s])${escapePattern(propertyName)}\\s*:\\s*([^;\\n}]+)`, 'i')
    );
}

export function readNumberProperty(css, propertyName) {
    const rawValue = readTextProperty(css, propertyName);
    if (rawValue === undefined) {
        return undefined;
    }

    const numberMatch = rawValue.match(/-?\d*\.?\d+/);
    return numberMatch ? parseFloat(numberMatch[0]) : undefined;
}

export function readRepeatCount(css, propertyName) {
    return readMatchNumber(
        css,
        new RegExp(`(?:^|[;{\\s])${escapePattern(propertyName)}\\s*:\\s*repeat\\(\\s*(\\d+)\\s*,`, 'i')
    );
}

export function readGridSpan(css, selector = '\\.card') {
    return readMatchNumber(
        css,
        new RegExp(`${selector}[\\s\\S]*?grid-column\\s*:\\s*1\\s*\\/\\s*span\\s*(\\d+)`, 'i')
    );
}

export function readTransformValue(css, transformName) {
    return readMatchNumber(
        css,
        new RegExp(`${escapePattern(transformName)}\\((-?\\d*\\.?\\d+)`, 'i')
    );
}

export function readControlValueFromCss(control, css) {
    if (typeof control.readValueFromCss === 'function') {
        return control.readValueFromCss(css);
    }

    const propertyName = control.cssProperty || derivePropertyName(control.key);
    const rawValue = readTextProperty(css, propertyName);
    if (rawValue === undefined) {
        return undefined;
    }

    return normalizeValue(control, rawValue);
}

=== bootcamp/lessons/shared/practice/render/sync-code-panels.js ===
function escapeHtml(text) {
    return String(text)
        .replaceAll('&', '&amp;')
        .replaceAll('<', '&lt;')
        .replaceAll('>', '&gt;');
}

function highlightCssValue(value) {
    return escapeHtml(value)
        .replace(/(\/\*.*?\*\/)/g, '<span class="token-comment">$1</span>')
        .replace(/([;{},])/g, '<span class="token-punctuation">$1</span>')
        .replace(/(#(?:[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}))/g, '<span class="token-value">$1</span>')
        .replace(/\b(\d+(?:\.\d+)?(?:px|rem|em|%|vh|vw|fr)?)\b/g, '<span class="token-number">$1</span>')
        .replace(/([a-z-]+)(?=\()/g, '<span class="token-function">$1</span>')
        .replace(/\b(display|flex|inline-flex|row|row-reverse|column|column-reverse|nowrap|wrap|wrap-reverse|center|flex-start|flex-end|space-between|space-around|space-evenly|stretch|baseline|auto|none|block|inline|relative|absolute|inherit|initial|unset)\b/g, '<span class="token-keyword">$1</span>');
}

function highlightCssCode(code) {
    return String(code)
        .split('\n')
        .map((line) => {
            const indent = line.match(/^\s*/)?.[0] || '';
            const trimmed = line.trim();

            if (!trimmed) {
                return '';
            }

            if (trimmed.startsWith('/*') && trimmed.endsWith('*/')) {
                return `${indent}<span class="token-comment">${escapeHtml(trimmed)}</span>`;
            }

            if (trimmed === '{' || trimmed === '}') {
                return `${indent}<span class="token-punctuation">${escapeHtml(trimmed)}</span>`;
            }

            if (trimmed.startsWith('@')) {
                return `${indent}${escapeHtml(trimmed)
                    .replace(/^(@[a-z-]+)/, '<span class="token-atrule">$1</span>')
                    .replace(/([;{},])/g, '<span class="token-punctuation">$1</span>')}`;
            }

            if (trimmed.includes('{')) {
                const openBraceIndex = line.indexOf('{');
                const selector = line.slice(0, openBraceIndex).trimEnd();
                const suffix = line.slice(openBraceIndex + 1);
                return `${indent}<span class="token-selector">${escapeHtml(selector.trim())}</span><span class="token-punctuation">{</span>${highlightCssValue(suffix)}`;
            }

            if (trimmed.includes(':')) {
                const propertyIndex = line.indexOf(':');
                const property = line.slice(0, propertyIndex);
                const value = line.slice(propertyIndex + 1);
                return `${indent}<span class="token-property">${escapeHtml(property.trim())}</span><span class="token-punctuation">:</span>${highlightCssValue(value)}`;
            }

            return `${indent}${highlightCssValue(trimmed)}`;
        })
        .join('\n');
}

function highlightHtmlCode(code) {
    return String(code)
        .split('\n')
        .map((line) => {
            const indent = line.match(/^\s*/)?.[0] || '';
            const trimmed = line.trim();

            if (!trimmed) {
                return '';
            }

            if (trimmed.startsWith('<!--') && trimmed.endsWith('-->')) {
                return `${indent}<span class="token-comment">${escapeHtml(trimmed)}</span>`;
            }

            return `${indent}${highlightHtmlLine(trimmed)}`;
        })
        .join('\n');
}

function highlightHtmlLine(line) {
    return String(line)
        .split(/(<[^>]+>)/g)
        .filter(Boolean)
        .map((segment) => {
            if (!segment.startsWith('<') || !segment.endsWith('>')) {
                return escapeHtml(segment);
            }

            return highlightHtmlTag(segment);
        })
        .join('');
}

function highlightHtmlTag(tag) {
    if (tag.startsWith('<!--') && tag.endsWith('-->')) {
        return `<span class="token-comment">${escapeHtml(tag)}</span>`;
    }

    const isClosingTag = tag.startsWith('</');
    const isSelfClosingTag = tag.endsWith('/>');
    const rawBody = tag.slice(isClosingTag ? 2 : 1, tag.length - (isSelfClosingTag ? 2 : 1));
    const tagNameMatch = rawBody.match(/^([^\s/>]+)/);

    if (!tagNameMatch) {
        return escapeHtml(tag);
    }

    const tagName = tagNameMatch[1];
    const attributesSource = rawBody.slice(tagName.length);
    const openToken = isClosingTag ? '&lt;/' : '&lt;';
    const closeToken = isSelfClosingTag ? '/&gt;' : '&gt;';

    return [
        `<span class="token-punctuation">${openToken}</span>`,
        `<span class="token-keyword">${escapeHtml(tagName)}</span>`,
        highlightHtmlAttributes(attributesSource),
        `<span class="token-punctuation">${closeToken}</span>`
    ].join('');
}

function highlightHtmlAttributes(source) {
    let html = '';
    let cursor = 0;
    const pattern = /(\s+)([^\s=/>]+)(\s*=\s*(?:"[^"]*"|'[^']*'|[^\s"'=<>`]+))?/g;

    for (const match of source.matchAll(pattern)) {
        const [fullMatch, leadingSpace, attributeName, assignment = ''] = match;
        const matchIndex = match.index ?? 0;

        if (matchIndex > cursor) {
            html += escapeHtml(source.slice(cursor, matchIndex));
        }

        html += escapeHtml(leadingSpace);
        html += `<span class="token-property">${escapeHtml(attributeName)}</span>`;
        html += highlightHtmlAssignment(assignment);
        cursor = matchIndex + fullMatch.length;
    }

    if (cursor < source.length) {
        html += escapeHtml(source.slice(cursor));
    }

    return html;
}

function highlightHtmlAssignment(source) {
    if (!source) {
        return '';
    }

    const assignmentMatch = source.match(/^(\s*)=(\s*)([\s\S]+)$/);
    if (!assignmentMatch) {
        return escapeHtml(source);
    }

    const [, spaceBeforeEquals, spaceAfterEquals, value] = assignmentMatch;

    return [
        escapeHtml(spaceBeforeEquals),
        '<span class="token-punctuation">=</span>',
        escapeHtml(spaceAfterEquals),
        `<span class="token-value">${escapeHtml(value)}</span>`
    ].join('');
}

function highlightPreviewCode(source) {
    const rawSource = String(source || '');
    const cssMarker = '\n/* Scene CSS */\n';
    const hasHtmlMarker = rawSource.startsWith('<!-- Scene HTML -->\n');
    const hasCssSection = rawSource.includes(cssMarker);
    let htmlSource = rawSource;
    let cssSource = '';

    if (hasCssSection) {
        const splitIndex = rawSource.indexOf(cssMarker);
        htmlSource = rawSource.slice(0, splitIndex);
        cssSource = rawSource.slice(splitIndex + cssMarker.length);
    }

    if (hasHtmlMarker) {
        htmlSource = htmlSource.slice('<!-- Scene HTML -->\n'.length);
    }

    const parts = [];

    if (hasHtmlMarker) {
        parts.push('<span class="token-comment">&lt;!-- Scene HTML --&gt;</span>');
    }

    parts.push(highlightHtmlCode(htmlSource));

    if (hasCssSection) {
        parts.push('');
        parts.push('<span class="token-comment">/* Scene CSS */</span>');
        parts.push(highlightCssCode(cssSource));
    }

    return parts.join('\n');
}

function countLines(source) {
    const text = String(source || '');
    return text ? text.split('\n').length : 1;
}

function renderLineNumbers(source) {
    const lineCount = countLines(source);
    return Array.from({ length: lineCount }, (_, index) => `<span>${index + 1}</span>`).join('');
}

function syncEditorScroll(editor, highlight, gutterLines) {
    highlight.style.transform = `translate(${-editor.scrollLeft}px, ${-editor.scrollTop}px)`;
    gutterLines.style.transform = `translateY(${-editor.scrollTop}px)`;
}

function syncPreviewScroll(preview, gutterLines) {
    gutterLines.style.transform = `translateY(${-preview.scrollTop}px)`;
}

function bindCssPanel(editor, highlight, gutterLines) {
    if (editor.dataset.ideBound === 'true') {
        return;
    }

    editor.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        syncEditorScroll(editor, highlight, gutterLines);
    });

    editor.addEventListener('input', () => {
        syncCssCodePanel();
    });

    editor.dataset.ideBound = 'true';
}

function bindPreviewPanel(preview, gutterLines) {
    if (preview.dataset.ideBound === 'true') {
        return;
    }

    preview.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        syncPreviewScroll(preview, gutterLines);
    });

    preview.dataset.ideBound = 'true';
}

export function syncCodeEditorPanel({
    editorId,
    highlightId,
    gutterId,
    language = 'css'
}) {
    const editor = document.getElementById(editorId);
    const highlight = document.getElementById(highlightId);
    const gutterLines = document.getElementById(gutterId);
    if (!editor || !highlight || !gutterLines) {
        return;
    }

    bindCssPanel(editor, highlight, gutterLines);
    highlight.innerHTML = language === 'html'
        ? highlightHtmlCode(editor.value)
        : highlightCssCode(editor.value);
    gutterLines.innerHTML = renderLineNumbers(editor.value);
    syncEditorScroll(editor, highlight, gutterLines);
}

export function syncCssCodePanel() {
    syncCodeEditorPanel({
        editorId: 'css-editor',
        highlightId: 'css-editor-highlight',
        gutterId: 'css-editor-gutter',
        language: 'css'
    });
}

export function syncPreviewCodePanel(source) {
    const preview = document.getElementById('html-preview');
    const gutterLines = document.getElementById('html-preview-gutter');
    if (!preview || !gutterLines) {
        return;
    }

    bindPreviewPanel(preview, gutterLines);
    preview.innerHTML = highlightPreviewCode(source);
    preview.dataset.rawSource = source;
    gutterLines.innerHTML = renderLineNumbers(source);
    syncPreviewScroll(preview, gutterLines);
}
